MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Matthew P. Harrington, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CELINE CALALANG, ANTHONY OS CALALANG, ROY FERRER, JOCELIJN HANH MILLER, HARRY SOUTLETTE, JR. DANIEL S. SUH and JENNIFER E. PARK.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 80 dismissed without prejudice.
Natalie Valdez-Smith sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

SEVERAL LIABILITY: Each defendant is severally liable according to the specific causes of action referenced in the Complaint filed on May 16, 2012 as follows:

Total: $12,044.60

ROY FERRER:
